description.value: Price 2,650 gp; Slot none; CL 13th; Weight â; Aura moderate divination and illusion DESCRIPTION This intricate mechanism opens like a pocket watch to reveal a set of dials indicating the current phase of the moon, as well as the previous and upcoming phases. A moon clock can be destroyed as a standard action to release a powerful blast of lunar energy in a 30-foot-radius burst. Lycanthropes in the area of this blast must succeed at a DC 20 Will save or revert to their humanoid forms. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 1,325 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells divination, lunar veil
